==Neandergal ♀==
Said to be close to the modern homosapiens (close enough to be eaten)

===Begin Friendship===
To obtain Neandergal, fully defeat the {{Relink|Origin of Species|orange}} Mirage. 

===☆☆☆ > ★★★===
After 3 letters back and forth, Neandergal will move in permanently with her minion, Berserker.

==Rent==
[[File:Neanderthal rent.png|frameless|300x300px|left]]

Neandergal rent is collected on '''Monday''' and appear as a bone under the fire.

 '''Normal Rent''': random Demon God Cell +500

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Crimson Dragon Scale|purple}}; {{RewardIconWithLink|Crystalized Rib|purple}}

 '''1-time Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Astronaut Cap|green}}

{{clear}}

==Relics==
Upgrading these will earn Gear Chest!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|★
|Gear Chest +10
|-
|★★
|Gear Chest +10
|-
|★★★
|Gear Chest +10
|-
|★★★★
|Gear Chest +20
|-
|★★★★★
|Gear Chest +30
|-
|★★★★★★
|Gear Chest +40
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Gregor Specimen}}{{Relink|Gregor Specimen}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Atilla Horseshoe}}{{Relink|Atilla Horseshoe}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Prehistoric Fossil}}{{Relink|Prehistoric Fossil}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Dolly Specimen}}{{Relink|Dolly Specimen}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Along the River}}{{Relink|Along the River}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Nuclear Bomb}}{{Relink|Nuclear Bomb}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Devol's Robot}}{{Relink|Devol's Robot}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Ape's Footprint Fossil}}{{Relink|Ape's Footprint Fossil}}
|}

==Neandergal Hunting==
In the harsh natural environment of prehistoric times, races without high hunting skills wouldn't last long...

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||FAME +5||RUSH +5
|-
|2||180||2k||FAME +10||RUSH +10
|-
|3||190||4.5k||FAME +15||RUSH +15
|-
|4||200||8k||FAME +20||RUSH +20
|-
|5||210||12.5k||FAME +25||RUSH +25
|-
|6||220||18k||FAME +30||RUSH +30
|-
|7||230||24.5k||FAME +35||RUSH +35
|-
|8||240||32k||FAME +40||RUSH +40
|-
|9||250||40.5k||FAME +45||RUSH +45
|-
|10||260||50k||FAME +50||RUSH +50
|-
|11||270||60.5k||FAME +55||RUSH +55
|-
|12||285||72k||FAME +60||RUSH +60
|-
|13||300||84.5k||FAME +65||RUSH +65
|-
|14||315||98k||FAME +70||RUSH +70
|-
|15||330||112k||FAME +75||RUSH +75
|-
|16||345||123k||FAME +80||RUSH +80
|-
|17||360||144k||FAME +85||RUSH +85
|-
|18||375||162k||FAME +90||RUSH +90
|-
|19||390||180k||FAME +95||RUSH +95
|-
|20||400||200k||FAME +100||RUSH +100
|-
|21||420||220k||FAME +105||RUSH +105
|-
|22||440||242k||FAME +110||RUSH +110
|-
|23||460||264k||FAME +115||RUSH +115
|-
|24||480||285k||FAME +120||RUSH +120
|-
|25||500||309k||FAME +125||RUSH +125
|-
|26||520||333k||FAME +130||RUSH +130
|-
|27||540||357k||FAME +135||RUSH +135
|-
|28||560||381k||FAME +140||RUSH +140
|-
|29||580||405k||FAME +145||RUSH +145
|-
|30||600||429k||FAME +150||RUSH +150
|}

==Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Neadergal Hunting is.

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +10
|-
|2||4k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +20
|-
|3||6k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +30
|-
|4||8k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +40
|-
|5||10k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +50
|-
|6||12k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +60
|-
|7||14k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +70
|-
|8||16k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +80
|-
|9||18k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +90
|-
|10||20k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +100
|-
|11||22k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +110
|-
|12||24k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +120
|-
|13||26k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +130 
|-
|14||28k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +140 
|-
|15||30k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +150
|-
|16||32k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +160
|-
|17||34k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +170 
|-
|18||36k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +180
|-
|19||38k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +190
|-
|20||40k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +200
|-
|21||42k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +210
|-
|22||44k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +220 
|-
|23||46k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +230
|-
|24||48k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +240
|-
|25||50k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +250
|-
|26||55k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +260
|-
|27||60k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +270
|-
|28||65k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +280
|-
|29||70k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +290
|-
|30||75k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop ATK +300
|}

==Research Ability==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Neandergal specializes in '''Demon Genes''' specialization and therefore the research manual cost for the Demon is halved.

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

==Minion - Berserker==
Forget about crowd control, healing, and positioning. Hacking and slashing are the only things it does, which actually work quite well by the way.

===Special Ability - Argh!===
Per 10 Berserkers in battle, Troop Fire DMG +1 (multiplied by minion level)

===Minion Relics===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Berserkers!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Pinocchio}}<br>{{relink|Pinocchio}}
|Berserker HP +1%
|Berserker DEF +1%
|Berserker ATK +1%
|Berserker RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Gregor Specimen}}<br>{{relink|Gregor Specimen}}
|Berserker HP +1%
|Berserker DEF +1%
|Berserker ATK +1%
|Berserker RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|The Starry Night}}<br>{{relink|The Starry Night}}
|Berserker HP +2%
|Berserker DEF +2%
|Berserker ATK +2%
|Berserker RUSH +2% 
|Berserker All Stats +3% 
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Napoleon Painting}}<br>{{relink|Napoleon Painting}}
|Berserker HP +2%
|Berserker DEF +2%
|Berserker ATK +2%
|Berserker RUSH +2%
|Berserker All Stats +3% 
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|The School of Athens}}<br>{{relink|The School of Athens}}
|Berserker DEF +4%
|Berserker DEF +4%
|Berserker DEF +4%
|Berserker DEF +4%
|Berserker DEF +4%
|Berserker DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Swan Lake}}<br>{{relink|Swan Lake}}
|Berserker ATK +4%
|Berserker ATK +4%
|Berserker ATK +4%
|Berserker ATK +4%
|Berserker ATK +4%
|Berserker ATK +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Ode to Joy}}<br>{{relink|Ode to Joy}}
|Berserker RUSH +4%
|Berserker RUSH +4%
|Berserker RUSH +4%
|Berserker RUSH +4%
|Berserker RUSH +4%
|Berserker RUSH +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Ragnarok}}<br>{{relink|Ragnarok}}
|Berserker HP +4%
|Berserker HP +4%
|Berserker HP +4%
|Berserker HP +4%
|Berserker HP +4%
|Berserker HP +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
